SELECT sys.right_shift_assign(ip, inet '192.168.1/24') AS result FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip = inet '192.168.1.0/24';
SELECT sys.right_shift_assign(ip, inet '192.168.2/24') AS result FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip = inet '192.168.1.100/24';
SELECT sys.right_shift_assign(ip, inet '192.168.1.0/24', inet '192.168.1.0/24') AS result FROM ip_addresses;
SELECT sys.right_shift_assign(ip, inet '192.168.1/24') FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ip FROM ip_addresses) AS unique_ips WHERE ip <> inet '192.168.3.0/24';
CREATE TABLE devices (device_id INT, ip inet);
SELECT d.device_id, sys.right_shift_assign(d.ip, i.ip) AS result FROM devices d JOIN ip_addresses i ON d.ip = i.ip WHERE d.device_id = 1;
SELECT count(*) FROM devices WHERE sys.right_shift_assign(ip, inet '192.168.1/24') = TRUE;
UPDATE ip_addresses SET ip = inet '192.168.1.0/24' WHERE ip = inet '192.168.1.100/24';
SELECT sys.right_shift_assign(ip, inet '192.168.1/24') FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip IN (SELECT ip FROM devices WHERE device_id = 2);
